signals.headline: US Regulators Officially Classified SOL and ETH as Commodities in March 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US Regulators Officially Classified SOL and ETH as Commodities in March 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
This classification, confirmed in [1], eliminated major legal uncertainty for both assets, enabling allocator decisions and following spot ETF approvals (ETH in 2024, SOL in Oct 2025), directly impacting investment flows and prediction markets on regulatory clarity[1].

signals.headline: Ethereum Repeats 250% Breakout Pattern from April 2025 | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Ethereum Repeats 250% Breakout Pattern from April 2025 | YES | MED confidence**  
ETH mirrors the weekly chart pattern that drove a 250% rally, breaking $2,350 resistance amid 8.6% daily gains and 41% transaction surge, likely boosting correlated assets like SOL per trader analysis[1][4].
matched_markets: Ethereum Up or Down - April 23, 2:30AM-2:35AM ET

signals.headline: Solana Validators Approved Alpenglow Upgrade Last Week | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Validators Approved Alpenglow Upgrade Last Week | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The upgrade cuts finality time from 12 seconds to under 200ms, enabling high-frequency trading and real-time payments onchain—a transformative consensus redesign positioning SOL competitively against ETH[1].

signals.headline: Solana Hits Record 167M Token Holders in April 2026 | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Hits Record 167M Token Holders in April 2026 | YES | MED confidence**  
Holders reached 166.9M (up 12% since Oct 2025), ranking SOL 4th among L1s, with $34.9M inflows last week per CoinShares, though offset by $18.2B outflows reducing short-term price lift odds[3].
matched_markets: Will the price of Solana be above $90 on April 28?
